title: AN ACT CONVERTING RIZAL STREET IN LA PAZ, ILOILO CUT INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3211; 109 OG No. 27, 4708 (July 8, 2013); Manila Bulletin, April 25, 2013

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10457, April 16, 2013 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING RIZAL STREET IN LA PAZ, ILOILO CUT INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Rizal Street in La Paz, Iloilo City is hereby converted into a national road under the supervision of the Department of Public Works and Highways.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Public Works and Highways shall include in the Departmentâs program the improvement, repair and maintenance of the said road, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in a national newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on January 30, 2013 and December 18, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 16 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
